# Journey so far

::: {.quote}
*"The more I learn, the more I realize how much I don't know."* -- Albert Einstein.
:::

### 🎓 Education

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
**MPS in Informatics**  
_Northeastern University, Canada_  
**2025 – 2026**  
Specialised in Data Science & Health Analytics.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**MPhil in Computer Science**  
_University of Energy and Natural Resources_  
**2021 – 2023**  
Focused on Artificial Intelligence & Software Engineering.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**BSc in Information Technology Education**  
_University of Education, Winneba_  
**2016 – 2020**  
Blended Computer Science with Pedagogical Technology.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**Diploma in Basic Education**  
_University of Cape Coast, Cape Coast_  
**2010 – 2013**  
Focused on Science & Mathematics Education.
:::

:::
<!-- end timeline -->
